description: Customer asks whether the store ships to Canada. Phase 1 should search_kb; when no article answers, the replan nudge must steer to ask_operator instead of drafting a customer reply. classifyHomePlan should surface this as needs_merchant_input.

messages.contentText: Hi there! Do you ship to Canada? I'd love to buy the wool throw blanket but want to make sure it can reach me first.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their shipping question.
